name: Locked
short_description: Maks is looking for a waitress he hasn’t seen for over a month. Intuition brings him to an abandoned mansion enshrouded in mystery and secrets. Will Maks find and save the girl?
detailed_description:
A visual novel depicting a hero called Maks, who is seeking for a waitress which he hasn’t seen for more than a month.

Maks has recently finished his studies and is desperately trying to sort out his life. He visits a bar, “The Polaroid”, regularly to get drunk and chat with a ginger haired, pretty waitress, which he is afraid to ask out on a date.

Then one day he doesn’t find her at the bar and decides to go look for her.
Intuition brought him to a mystery mansion; a place of gossip and criminal tales.
Will Maks find the stranger and unravel the mystery of the cursed mansion?

Game features:
  • Detailed description of the main characters - bold red headed Hoshi and modest cute Maks.
  • An unpredictable storyline with freedom of choice, which can lead to different endings.
  • Atmospheric music - from classics to modern electric.
  • Animated “life-like” characters.
  • An intriguing and touching story, which won’t take more than an hour to finish.
